CustomField.description: Attaches the interaction log to this aircraft. If the log is created from the corresponding Aircraft page, this field will be auto populated
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Attaches the interaction log to this aircraft. If the log is created from the corresponding Aircraft page, this field will be auto populated. To link additional Assets, please do so after save and use the Add Assets field on editing an Interaction Log.
CustomField.label: Related To Aircraft
